name: Strawberries

pros.title: sweetness is kept unusually well in check
pros.explanation: That makes the fruit profile much cleaner than average.

pros.title: easy to use as a whole food
pros.explanation: Simple, recognisable, and realistic for everyday eating.

pros.title: brings a clean fruit identity
pros.explanation: It still contributes something valuable even when it is not elite.

cons.title: protein contribution is tiny
cons.explanation: That is normal for fruit, but it still limits nutritional breadth.

cons.title: sugar can climb fast
cons.explanation: A lot of fruits look healthy but still lean sweet.

cons.title: satiety is not especially strong
cons.explanation: Fruit often needs help from the rest of the meal.

sourceNotes: Expanded dataset sample for FoodRanked pressure-testing.
Values are approximate representative placeholders for category tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
